DoubleDiamond.label: Our Approach
DoubleDiamond.title: From Discovery to Delivery
DoubleDiamond.subtitle: Using the Double Diamond framework, we work alongside you to uncover challenges and build solutions.

discover.title: Discover — Find the Problem
discover.description: Through interviews and observation, we deeply understand your current situation and uncover hidden challenges.

define.title: Define — Clarify the Problem
define.description: We organize findings and pinpoint the real problem that needs solving.

develop.title: Develop — Build Solutions
develop.description: Two approaches to bring solutions to life.
develop.trainingDesc: Workshop-style learning to build IT skills and know-how
develop.coachingDesc: Working side by side to solve challenges together

deliver.title: Deliver — Realize Results
deliver.description: We stay with you through implementation and adoption for lasting results.

Banner.message: This website is currently being prepared and will be ready soon. Thank you for your patience.

problem.label: The Reality of Small Business
problem.title:
Business is growing,
but operations are still on paper.
problem.subtitle:
As digitization accelerates,
many small businesses are falling behind the wave.

items.text: Bookings by phone and notebook. Double-bookings keep you up at night.
No website — or one that hasn't been updated in years.
Want to use social media, but don't know where to start.
No budget for IT. Hard to see the return on investment.

solution.label: The Solution
solution.title:
ProtoA walks with you
through the very first step
of your digital journey.
solution.subtitle:
A DX consultant who truly understands your business.
No jargon. We move at your pace, together.

services.title: What We Can Do
services.subtitle: From small improvements to big transformations.

consulting.title: One-on-One DX Consulting
consulting.description: We work with you to develop a personalized DX strategy. First-timers welcome — patient, hands-on support.

onlineSupport.title: Online Business Improvement
onlineSupport.description: Process improvement support from anywhere. Perfect for busy owners.

toolSelection.title: IT Tool Selection Support
toolSelection.description: We find the right tools for your budget and goals. Free tool recommendations included.

workflow.title: Workflow Digitization
workflow.description: Transform paper-based workflows into digital ones. Start with just one process.

testimonials.title: Our clients' businesses are already changing

items.name: Taro Yamada
items.quote: Setting up a LINE Official Account made booking management so much easier. Thank you for the patient guidance.

items.name: Hanako Sato
items.quote: After optimizing our Google Business Profile, international bookings tripled.

items.name: Ichiro Tanaka
items.quote: The POS system dramatically reduced inventory management time, letting us focus on customer service.

cta.title: Ready to talk?
cta.subtitle: Free consultations start at 30 minutes. No pressure.

mission.label: Mission
mission.statement:
Empowering business owners
in Miyakojima and Japan
to thrive on the world stage

vision.label: Vision
vision.statement:
To become the #1 DX consulting
firm in clarity and trust

who.label: Who We Serve
who.description: Small and medium businesses in Miyakojima facing management challenges

what.label: What We Do
what.description: One-on-one, online business improvement support specialized for regional businesses

difference.label: Our Difference
difference.description: We use local knowledge to help solve complex challenges in a friendly, easy-to-understand way

team.title: Our Team
team.description: A team passionate about and dedicated to supporting business growth.

training.title: Training
training.description: We train your team on IT literacy and digital tools, tailored to each employee's skill level. Build practical skills that can be applied immediately, boosting your organization's overall DX capability.
features: Curriculum designed for your team's skill level
Hands-on training focused on the tools you actually use

accompaniment.title: Hands-on DX Support
accompaniment.description: End-to-end support from analysis and strategy to tool implementation and adoption. We walk alongside you at your pace — from the very first step to full integration.
features: Current situation analysis and challenge identification
Optimal IT tool selection and implementation support
